summary: Iteration 14 - Staff Management & Role-Based Branch Access Testing. All 13 tests passed (100%). Verified staff CRUD operations and branch restriction for cashier role.
passed_tests: GET /api/staff/roles - Returns 6 available roles (branch_manager, supervisor, cashier, delivery, waiter, kitchen)
POST /api/staff - Create staff member with branch assignment (200 OK)
GET /api/staff - Get staff list returns all staff members
GET /api/branches (cashier) - Cashier sees only 1 branch (their assigned branch)
GET /api/orders (cashier) - Cashier sees only orders from their branch (18 orders verified)
Admin vs Cashier comparison - Admin sees 3 branches, Cashier sees 1 branch
Existing cashier (cashier1@test.com) - Branch restriction working correctly

staff_crud.delete: DELETE /api/staff/{id} - Working (deactivates instead of hard delete)

branch_restriction_for_cashier.branches_endpoint: GET /api/branches - Cashier sees only their assigned branch
branch_restriction_for_cashier.orders_endpoint: GET /api/orders - Cashier sees only orders from their branch

critical_code_review_comments: Staff management APIs correctly implement CRUD operations
build_branch_query function correctly filters branches and orders for non-admin users
Cashier role correctly restricted to see only their assigned branch
Admin and Manager roles have full access to all branches and orders
Staff creation correctly assigns tenant_id from current user
Invalid roles are properly rejected with 400 status code
seed_data_creation: Created test staff member during testing (deactivated after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 completed. All staff management features are working correctly: 1) GET /api/staff/roles returns 6 available roles, 2) Staff CRUD operations work correctly, 3) Cashier role is correctly restricted to see only their assigned branch in both /api/branches and /api/orders endpoints, 4) Admin role has full access to all branches and orders. The build_branch_query function correctly implements branch-based filtering for non-admin users.
